sourceMovie.title: Spider-Man 3
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Spider-Man 3 (2007) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Captain America: Civil War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Spider-Man 3 clicked for you, Captain America: Civil War (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Spider-Man 3?
faq.answer: Try Captain America: Civil War, Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2, Iron Man 2—each shares DNA with Spider-Man 3 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Spider-Man 3?
faq.answer: Spider-Man 3 (2007) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Spider-Man 3 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Spider-Man Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
